postReview.title: LA Galaxy made 'uphill battle' in Real Salt Lake defeat, says Vanney
postReview.description: LA Galaxy are yet to win in MLS this season, with their winless streak extending to seven games after a 2-0 defeat to Real Salt Lake.

QAData.answer: Real Salt Lake won 2–0 over LA Galaxy on Sat, 05 Apr 2025 20:30:00 GMT.
